title: Taboo
questions: Do you use taboo words in your own language? Why/not?
Why do you think some people use taboo words a lot?
Why do you think some people are particularly offended by taboo words?
Why do students often find it easy to remember taboo words in English?
How useful is it for you to know taboo words in English?
Do you think learning taboo words is a waste of time? Why/not?
Do you think teachers should teach taboo words to students or not? Why?
